title: ceanothus oliganthus var. tomentosus
intro: Ceanothus oliganthus var. tomentosus, also known as the hairy snowbrush, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the buckthorn family (Rhamnaceae). It is native to the western coast of North America, particularly in the mountainous regions of California and Oregon. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Ceanothus oliganthus var. tomentosus include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture for these purposes.
